name: The Campbell's Company
description: The Campbell's Company, formerly Campbell Soup Company, is a leading American multinational food company. Best known for its flagship canned soup products, the company has expanded its portfolio to include a diverse range of brands across meals, beverages, and snacks, such as Goldfish, Pepperidge Farm, Snyder's of Hanover, and V8. Headquartered in Camden, New Jersey, the company focuses on delivering high-quality, convenient, and delicious food products to consumers worldwide.
